title: The Transformers
synopsis: The original series that started it all. The heroic Autobots, led by Optimus Prime, battle the evil Decepticons on Earth after crash-landing on the planet millions of years ago.

title: Scramble City
synopsis: A standalone OVA depicting the construction of the Autobot mobile fortress Scramble City and the battle between combiner teams.

title: Transformers: The Movie
synopsis: The epic animated film. Unicron threatens Cybertron, Optimus Prime falls, and Hot Rod must become Rodimus Prime to save their world.

title: Transformers: The Headmasters
synopsis: Japanese continuation of G1 where Transformers bond with smaller humanoid partners called Headmasters, gaining enhanced abilities in their ongoing battle.

title: Transformers: Super-God Masterforce
synopsis: Humans merge with Transtector bodies to become powerful Transformers, defending Earth against the Decepticon Pretenders in this Japanese-exclusive series.

title: Transformers: Victory
synopsis: Star Saber, the greatest Autobot swordsman, leads the Autobots against the fearsome Deathsaurus and his Decepticon forces in this beloved Japanese series.

title: Transformers: Zone
synopsis: Dai Atlas takes command of the Autobots to fight the mysterious Nine Great Demon Generals in this Japan-only OVA.

title: Beast Wars: Transformers
synopsis: Maximals and Predacons crash-land on a mysterious prehistoric planet, adopting beast modes to survive. A groundbreaking CGI series that redefined the franchise.

title: Beast Wars II
synopsis: Lio Convoy leads the Maximals against Galvatron's Predacons on the planet Gaia in this Japanese spin-off of Beast Wars.

title: Beast Wars Neo
synopsis: Big Convoy trains a new team of young Maximal cadets while searching for the mysterious Angolmois capsules across the galaxy.

title: Beast Machines: Transformers
synopsis: The Maximals return to a Cybertron transformed by Megatron's techno-organic virus, fighting to restore organic life to their mechanized homeworld.

title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
synopsis: Optimus Prime leads the Autobots against Megatron and the Predacons who seek to steal Earth's energy resources in this action-comedy series.

title: Transformers: Armada
synopsis: The discovery of the Mini-Cons reignites the war between Autobots and Decepticons, as both sides race to find these powerful small Transformers.

title: Transformers: Energon
synopsis: Ten years after Armada, a new Energon-powered threat emerges as Alpha Quintesson and a revived Megatron threaten the fragile peace.

title: Transformers: Cybertron
synopsis: With Cybertron consumed by a black hole, the Autobots search the universe for the four Cyber Planet Keys that can save their homeworld.

title: Transformers: Animated
synopsis: A ragtag group of Autobots led by Optimus Prime defend Detroit from Decepticons and supervillains in this stylistically unique, critically acclaimed series.

title: Transformers: Prime
synopsis: Team Prime — Optimus, Arcee, Bulkhead, Bumblebee, and Ratchet — protect Earth and three human allies from Megatron's Decepticons in this Emmy-winning series.

title: Transformers: Go!
synopsis: Japanese OVA featuring two teams of ancient Swordbots — Samurai and Shinobi — who awaken to battle Predacons seeking the legendary Legendiscs.

title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
synopsis: Bumblebee leads a new team of Autobots to recapture Decepticon fugitives who escaped from a crashed prison ship on Earth.

title: Transformers: Combiner Wars
synopsis: Forty years after the Great War, the Enigma of Combination creates powerful Combiner warriors that threaten Cybertron's peace. Windblade must stop Starscream's scheme to absorb them all.

title: Transformers: Titans Return
synopsis: The Titan Trypticon reawakens on a rebuilding Cybertron. As Overlord returns and Fortress Maximus rises, the ancient Megatronus arrives to herald the end of the Transformers.

title: Transformers: Power of the Primes
synopsis: With Optimus Prime dead, Megatron leads an unlikely alliance to stop Megatronus from assembling the Requiem Blaster and annihilating all Transformer life.

title: Transformers: Cyberverse
synopsis: Bumblebee has lost his memory and must piece together his past with the help of Windblade while battling Decepticons on Earth.
